name: @0x-copilot/cli
description: Install and launch the 0xCopilot desktop app from your terminal — no DMG, no installer.

scripts.check: node --check bin/copilot.mjs && node --check lib/paths.mjs && node --check lib/stage.mjs && node --check lib/launch.mjs && node --check lib/doctor.mjs && node --check lib/uninstall.mjs && node --check lib/ui.mjs
scripts.smoke: node bin/copilot.mjs version && node bin/copilot.mjs help

author: 0xCopilot
